one_line_thesis: Biogen — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

investment_committee.strongest_dissent: The model may count a portfolio narrative as diversified optionality even though clinical, reimbursement, patent and financing outcomes are correlated and the closing claims are not yet known.
unresolved_items: Product-level rebates, margins, sustaining cost and post-exclusivity tails do not reproduce marketed-product values.

decision.next_action: Close critical evidence gaps before freezing a decision-grade packet.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.strongest_dissent: The model may count a portfolio narrative as diversified optionality even though clinical, reimbursement, patent and financing outcomes are correlated and the closing claims are not yet known.

committee.next_action: Close the committee's primary-evidence blockers before requesting an owner decision.

gaps.question: Reconcile the acquisition closing balance sheet, borrowings, CVRs, integration costs, cash burn, and correlated downside.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: May 2026 close 8-K (~$5.3bn cost, $2bn term debt, ~$582m max CVR) sourced; post-close 10-Q balance sheet still required.

gaps.question: Build indication-level, non-overlapping probability trees using clinical base rates, milestones, timing, remaining R&D, and launch capital.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: litifilimab timing disclosed; independent probability trees and failure capital incomplete.

gaps.question: Build product-level revenue, patent, rebate, margin, tax, and commercial reinvestment schedules.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: product revenue disclosed; product-level margins/rebates/erosion tails incomplete.

gaps.question: Product-level rebates, margins, sustaining cost and post-exclusivity tails do not reproduce marketed-product values.
gaps.evidence_required: Resolve the committee's missing fact with primary evidence and update the affected valuation proof row.
gaps.acceptance_test: The committee item is explicitly closed, sourced, and reflected in the valuation range or documented as immaterial.

method_fit.label: Binary and milestone-driven assets
failure_modes: pipeline value counted in both revenue forecast and option schedule

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Biogen FY2025 results and 2025 Form 10-K: $9.891bn revenue, $2.1bn free cash flow, $4.2bn cash, $6.3bn debt, and approximately 147m diluted shares; Apellis transaction terms disclosed in 2026.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of BIIB, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Biogen FY2025 results and 2025 Form 10-K: $9.891bn revenue, $2.1bn free cash flow, $4.2bn cash, $6.3bn debt, and approximately 147m diluted shares; Apellis transaction terms disclosed in 2026.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

An Elephant Never Forgets On September 27, Eisai (JT: 4523) and Biogen (NASDAQ: BIIB) delivered one of the most seminal announcements in drug discovery and development history of the last century.
In December 2016, the FDA approve d Ionis (NA SDAQ: IONS) and Biogen’s (NASDAQ: BIIB) Spinraza, the first and only approved disease -modifying therapy for spinal muscular atrophy.
